videos.title: Who has the Worst Monitor at Linus Tech Tips?
videos.description:
Thanks to MSI for sponsoring this video and send us their new MPG 322UR QD-OLED X24 monitor! Head to https://msi.gm/SC5E0747 to check it out and grab your own!

You spend big on your PC, but forget the display? We're judging three LMG employees for committing this classic blunder! Watch us roast Peter, Kassandra, and Elijah's setups before giving the most neglected display a massive upgrade to the 4K 240Hz MSI MPG 322UR QD-OLED monitor. Who has the worst monitor at LMG?

videos.title: I Let Open Source AI Drive Me to Work
videos.description:
Get a free 15-day trial of Odoo’s all-in-one business solution and see how it can make your life easier! Check it out at https://www.odoo.com/ltt

We were pretty impressed with the Comma 3x when we first tested it last year, so we decided to stick Linus in a Toyota Corolla long-term so he could test out the Comma AI’s active driver assistance over several months. There were some ups and downs!

Comma's supported cars list:  https://docs.comma.ai/CARS/

videos.title: This Prototype Laptop Crushes Everything I’ve Ever Seen
videos.description:
Thanks to ASUS for sponsoring this video! Check out the the Strix SCAR 18 here: https://lmg.gg/IBcWH

We got an exclusive first look at the 2026 ASUS Strix SCAR 18. An absolute beast of a Laptop featuring top-tier hardware. Being a pre-production unit however, we had our hands tied and could only look at the display… Which also happens to be the best display a Laptop has ever seen.
